_comment: Sweep configuration - single source of truth for regimes & environment assumptions.
CSV paths are relative to the repo root (run via `make sim-sweep`).
trend-2021: ETH/GBP ~x3, Feb-May 2021, native Binance ETHGBP bars, 80 gwei regime.
chop-2024: Jul-Oct 2024 (ETH ranged ~$2.3-2.8k). Binance delisted GBP pairs in 2023,
so this is ETHUSDT divided by constant GBPUSD 1.30 - documented approximation (GBP/USD
vol is an order of magnitude below ETH's; does not move relative parameter ranking).
Supply a real composed ETH/GBP csv and drop `gbpusd` to tighten it.
